name: Cluster of Jewels
description: You have been assigned the Cluster of Jewels — a breathtaking Abell Class galaxy cluster where hundreds of diverse galaxies appear as multifaceted jewels against the cosmos. Ruby spirals and sapphire ellipticals fill this dense, dazzling field in a symphony of warm gold and multichromatic brilliance.

attributes.value: Ruby spirals and sapphire ellipticals in a dense jewelled field
